rule_metadata.author: Michael Epping, '@mepples21'
rule_metadata.title: Users Added to Global or Device Admin Roles

rules.rule_text:
title: Users Added to Global or Device Admin Roles
id: 11c767ae-500b-423b-bae3-b234450736ed
status: test
description: Monitor and alert for users added to device admin roles.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/architecture/security-operations-devices#device-administrator-roles
author: Michael Epping, '@mepples21'
date: 2022-06-28
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.initial-access
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1078.004
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: auditlogs
detection:
  selection:
    Category: RoleManagement
    OperationName|contains|all:
    - Add
    - member to role
    TargetResources|contains:
    - 7698a772-787b-4ac8-901f-60d6b08affd2
    - 62e90394-69f5-4237-9190-012177145e10
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
